title: 📣 Official monday.com Service Providers Thread

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you provide monday.com services_1350×1080 127 KB

Looking to offer your monday.com services or find the right expert to work with?
This is your space to connect.

Important: outside of this thread, promotional posts aren’t allowed under our community rules.

Here’s how to use this space:
If you offer monday.com services: introduce yourself, share your expertise, and tell us what makes you stand out.
If you’re looking for help or collaboration: post what you need and connect with the right people.

Pro tip: skip the generic pitch.
Instead, share what you’re really great at - the kind of work you love doing and that clients love you for.

This thread stays open. So feel free to come back anytime to add updates, projects, or new opportunities.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for this post Yuval!

Hey everyone, I’m Desiree

I help small businesses, nonprofits, and professional service teams get the most out of monday.com. I’ve done everything from cleaning up a messy workspace, setting up a full CRM, or automating the little things that make your day smoother.

I’m all about creating systems that actually work for real people (and look good while doing it).

You’ll probably see me around the community answering questions or sharing tips (I love helping others figure out how to make monday do what they need it to).

If you ever want to chat about workflow ideas, board setups, or just compare notes on automations that save your sanity, I’m all for it.

www.thecleverclovers.com desiree@thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: rochelleg (Rochelle Gebelius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all! I’m Rochelle from agilizeIQ.

My team and I build tools that make monday work smarter for teams who want more clarity with less effort.

Our first app, RecapIQ, helps teams automatically generate clean, beautifully formatted weekly email recaps from your boards. It pulls updates, statuses, and progress into a single AI-powered summary that looks polished and is easy to share.

RecapIQ is available now on the marketplace with a 14-day free trial if you’d like to see how it works.

If you help clients with monday implementations or reporting, I’d love to connect. RecapIQ is a great add-on for partners who want to give their clients automated visibility without adding admin work.

posts.author: dmitry_noliam (Dmitry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone, Dmitry here from Noliam.

We help teams get more out of monday.com: cleaner systems, faster processes, and less tool chaos.

Most clients come to us when things feel scattered or overcomplicated, and they want monday.com to actually run the business, not just store information.

What we’re strong at:

• Fixing messy setups and bringing real structure back

• Building CRM, Service, Ops, and Project systems people enjoy using

• Automating the repetitive work that slows teams down

• Connecting tools so everything works as one flow

We focus on clear, practical solutions. No bloat. No long consulting cycles. Just fast sprints and systems that make the day easier.

You’ll see us around the community sharing ideas and helping where we can.

If you want a second opinion on your workspace, need inspiration, or are stuck with a tricky flow — we’re always up for a chat.

Check us out here or contact me directly at dmitry.rasin@noliam.com

posts.author: Sergster (Sergio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! I’m Sergio.

I help teams translate ambitious visions into thoughtful setups that are practical, intuitive, and actually get used.

I usually partner with teams who:

  • Know what needs to be built, but don’t know how
  • Have something broken, and don’t know how to fix it
  • Have outgrown their setup and want to clean things up
  • Are still scratching the surface of what the platform can do

Go-to “monday person” at your team? Let’s connect—I’m happy to share ideas!

www.viridis.id | sergio@viridis.id

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Yuval — I’m Eric from Wild 6. I’m a Bronze monday.com Partner based in the U.S., and I spend most of my time helping teams take messy, scattered processes and turn them into clean, automated systems.

What I’m best at is building end-to-end workflows that actually match the way a business runs — CRMs, PMOs, service delivery pipelines, resource capacity setups, and anything that needs smart automations or Make/Zapier logic behind it. Clients usually come to me when their monday builds have grown too big, too complicated, or too manual, and they want something that’s scalable and easy for the team to manage.

I’ve been implementing monday for a little over five years now, with a background in operations, ERPs, and warehouse management, so I think a lot in terms of clarity, load balancing, and process efficiency. If you’re doing something interesting with automations, integrations, or system architecture, I’m always up for collaborating or sharing ideas.

Happy to connect with anyone building cool stuff here.

The Wild 6

The Wild6 - Bringing Structure to the Wild

Inspired by the energy and adaptability of a family with six children, our approach to business automation and workflow optimization is built on resilience, efficiency, and innovation.

posts.author: Ishika (Ishika )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone, I’m Ishika from BoloSign.

We help teams run all their contract and document workflows directly inside Monday, instead of juggling extra tools for PDFs and e-signatures.

You can generate documents like invoices, contracts, proposals, or onboarding docs directly from monday items and also collect legally valid eSignatures inside the same workflow, instead of exporting PDFs and chasing emails

We built the BoloSign eSign + PDF + forms app for monday (it was selected as a Top 25 App for 2025), and we also help with designing and implementing those flows end-to-end.

If you’re a Monday partner or team working on CRMs, service pipelines, or project systems and want to add a solid contract layer on top, happy to brainstorm setups or share examples of what’s working well for other teams.

You can find our app in the Monday marketplace by searching for BoloSign, and I’m always up for a chat here or via DM.

ishika@boloforms.com

posts.author: B3Daniel (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’m Dan from Lynx

We’ve built an app to help monday teams link and sync items between boards with the relevant data they want, whether it’s manually or with the built-in automations.

This is the start to something we envision to eventually become a workflow suite to help teams with their workflows, allowing items to live in multiple boards and stay at sync is just the first part of it, so they’ll have everything in the same place.

We’d love to hear your feedback about the current functionality and would love to hear your ideas on what can be added that will help ease your existing workflows within monday.

We recently released a new version to our app you can read more about it here.

What’s new in this version:

  • Relationship Templates: reusable templates for how data should flow between boards (your saved “linking recipe”)

  • Automations: use those templates in monday automations so linking happens automatically when something changes (status, new item, etc.)

    • We currently have some templates for automations and are working on supporting custom automations.

    • Templates include: status change, person assigned, item created, date arrived, date passed etc..

  • Bulk Actions: to make setup easier, you can apply a Relationship to a bunch of existing items at once (great for initial setup)

So how it works, you create yourself a template of how you’d like the items from Board A to be linked / shared to your target boards, each target board can have different columns linked to it (we understand that not all data is relevant in all boards), and then use that template for bulk item sharing/linking and in automations.

  • And you can pick what to sync per target board (example: 3 columns to Board A, 5 different columns to Board B), so you’re not forced into a one-size-fits-all setup.

How we think it can help:
Projects board > Invoices/Payments board + Revenue Forecast board relationship & automation.

When a project hits “Ready to invoice,” an automation links it into both boards linking billing fields to a Invoices/Payments board, and linking to the approvals/PO collection/follow-ups Finance Tasks board.

This can be used in many different flows, whether it’s sales / project management / development and we hope it will help save time for everyone using it.

If this sounds like it can help you or someone you know you can give it a try for free here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000969/lynx

posts.author: GanttGo (Hidai Bar-Mor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone I’m Hidai

I’m a developer building tools for monday. My app GanttGo helps you create shareable gantt charts and export them to PDF, Excel, or Power point - for when you need to share a polished timeline with clients, executives or stakeholders who aren’t in your workspace.

A few things that make it different:

  • Scheduled exports- Set it once and a fresh PDF automatically emails to stakeholders weekly, daily
  • Subitem support- your full hierarchy shows up on the chart, not just top level items
  • Critical path highlighting- see which tasks actually drive your end date
  • Weekend & holiday shading- visualize non-working days so timelines make sense
  • Excel export- When someone needs the raw data, not just visual

Also included: drag-to-edit on the chart, dark mode, your company logo on exports, and colorblind-friendly patterns.

Free tier works for smaller projects (upto 50 items), Pro unlocks everyhting.

If you’re a partner helping clients with project management or reporting, happy to chat about how this might fit. Always up for swapping ideas.

GanttGo on the monday marketplace

support@ganttgo.com

posts.author: PermitNerd (Percy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks, Yuva!

Hi everyone! My name is Percy, and I’m very excited to announce the release of our new app “PermitNerd”.

Link to marketplace page

If you’re using monday.com for construction or development projects, you know how important building permits are to keeping timelines on track. PermitNerd is designed to make permit visibility simple and accessible right inside your boards.

With PermitNerd you can:

• Search live building permit data across supported cities

• Pin permit records directly to any monday board

• Keep permit status connected to active projects

• Reduce time spent checking city portals

The goal is simple:

Make permit tracking seamless inside your existing monday workflow.

Search PermitNerd in the Marketplace to try it out.

We’d love your feedback and are happy to answer any questions. How is your team currently tracking permits in monday?

21920×960 357 KB
